LanguageData.RH_Settings_TechLeakStopper_Desc: Filters spacer-tech content that slips past tech-restriction mods (Odyssey Starjack raiders, certain quest rewards). Recommended alongside World Tech Level.
LanguageData.RH_Settings_EnemyHeroRaids_Desc: Large raids rarely include an enemy Hero escorted by combat gestrals. They drop vestment enhancements and, rarely, class tomes.
LanguageData.RH_Settings_AllowHeroCorpseDestruction_D: By default, hero corpses cannot be cremated or butchered, so revival remains possible. Enable to remove this protection.
LanguageData.RH_ScenPart_StartingHeroSummary: Your starting colonist is a Hero. You will choose their class when the game begins.
LanguageData.RH_DeathsDoorText: {0} has suffered wounds that would kill any ordinary person. Only their heroic destiny holds death at bay.\n\nEach hour they will make a death saving throw. Three successes and they stabilize. Three failures and they die. Tending their wounds improves the odds - and any further harm counts as a failure.
LanguageData.RH_DeathsDoorSave: {0} makes a death saving throw ({1}/{2} successes).
LanguageData.RH_DeathsDoorFail: {0} fails a death saving throw ({1}/{2} failures).
LanguageData.RH_DeathsDoorCritFail: {0} rolls a 1 on their death saving throw - two failures!
LanguageData.RH_DeathsDoorDamageFail: {0} was harmed while dying - automatic failure!
LanguageData.RH_DeathsDoorDeath: {0} has failed their last death saving throw.
LanguageData.RH_StabilizedText: {0} has won their fight at death's door and stabilized. They are out of immediate danger, though their wounds remain.
LanguageData.RH_NatTwentyText: Against all odds, {0} rolled a natural 20 on their death saving throw. Their wounds close before the eyes of onlookers - destiny is not finished with them yet.
LanguageData.RH_GestralArrived: A {0} gestral has arrived to serve {1}.
LanguageData.RH_GestralLost: {1}'s {0} gestral has perished. Another will come in time.
LanguageData.RH_NoSlots: No level-{0} spell slots remaining (long rest to recover)
LanguageData.RH_ShortRest: {0} feels refreshed - a spell slot returns. (short rest)
LanguageData.RH_LongRestComplete: {0} completes a long rest. All spell slots restored.
LanguageData.RH_LongRestGizmoDesc: Commit to a long rest: roughly twelve hours of sleep, after which all spell slots are restored. Progress accumulates while sleeping; toggle off to cancel.
LanguageData.RH_AutocastGizmoDesc: Toggle automatic casting of {0} at hostiles while drafted. Cantrips are enabled by default; leveled spells must be opted in.
